objective: ROW omitted argument uses caller row
notes: Formula is entered in B2 so caller row is 2.

objective: COLUMN omitted argument uses caller column
notes: Formula is entered in B2 so caller column is 2.

objective: ROW area result spills vertically with one entry per row
notes: Uses ROWS to pin spill height.

objective: COLUMN area result spills horizontally with one entry per column
notes: Uses COLUMNS to pin spill width.

objective: ROW area spill second entry is ending row
notes: Uses INDEX to pin spilled row payload.

objective: COLUMN area spill second entry is ending column
notes: Uses INDEX to pin spilled column payload.

objective: ROW whole-column result has full worksheet height
notes: Pins whole-column output cardinality without depending on spill placement.

objective: COLUMN whole-row result has full worksheet width
notes: Pins whole-row output cardinality without depending on spill placement.
